{{Quote|A chief scavenger the Rebellion'd dealt with before, when we hadn't any choice. I doubt you could find a crueler, more soulless man in the whole universe.|Wedge Antilles|<ref name="sw78" />}}
'''Arns Grimraker''' was a [[Cyborg/Legends|cyborg]] salvage operator who visited the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Hoth/Legends|Hoth]] in the wake of the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]].<ref name="sw78" /> He and his crew flew [[Gun tug/Legends|Gun tugs]] and used a [[GR-75 medium transport/Legends|GR-75 medium transport]], the ''[[Death Merchant]]'', to haul their spoils. Grimraker traveled to Hoth shortly after the conclusion of the battle—having previously had run-ins with the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]], he planned to destroy the remnants of [[Echo Base/Legends|Echo Base]] to send a message to any holdouts.<ref name="hoth">{{Wizards|url=default.asp?x=starwars/article/sw20031204hoth|text=Hoth: Under the Ice|int=Hoth: Under the Ice}}</ref> However, while on Hoth he encountered Rebel [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]], who stole the ''Death Merchant'' after being left behind on the world in the chaos of the evacuation. Grimraker and his crew pursued, only to be annihilated by a force of [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE fighters]] patrolling around Hoth.<ref name="sw78" /> Grimraker had a [[Cybernetics/Legends|cybernetic]] left [[Eye/Legends|eye]] that greatly enhanced his vision, along with an artificial left hand that ended in a powerful claw.<ref name="hoth" />
